a: numbering of the carbons on the deoxyribose sugar

q: On which carbon of the deoxyribose sugar is the phosphate group located?

a: complementary base pairing within the same molecule

q: Where are all types of RNA molecules synthesized?

a: variety of sequences or bases along the length of a DNA molecule
